## App Version

Example: Alpha 0.1

## Operating System

Example: Windows 10 / Windows 11

## What did you test?

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Note input
- [ ] Rests
- [ ] Suri slides
- [ ] Lyrics
- [ ] Section labels
- [ ] Simile repeats
- [ ] Save/load
- [ ] JSON import/export
- [ ] PNG export
- [ ] PDF export
- [ ] Undo/redo
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts
- [ ] Help/About screens

## What worked well?

Describe what felt good or useful.

## What was confusing?

Describe anything unclear, difficult, or awkward.

## What broke?

Describe crashes, bugs, layout issues, or unexpected behavior.

## Suggestions

Write any improvement ideas here.

## Extra Notes

Add screenshots or files if useful.
